analysis.reasoning: Core message: An informational announcement that Sergey Lavrov will chair an SCO foreign ministers' videoconference. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – not referenced; no critique of the West. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system) – implicit alignment: highlighting Russia chairing an SCO ministerial meeting showcases Russia’s leadership role within a non-Western multilateral bloc, fitting the narrative of promoting cooperation outside Western influence. RU3 (benevolent partner) – no claims about peace, solidarity, or aid; just an agenda note. RU4 (history admirable) – not applicable. RU5 (world’s forefront) – no mention of achievements or superiority. RU6 (culture/nature) – not applicable. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU2.
